creator: zeus@gnu.org.ua
text:
same for me
13.1 and 13.2 on Hetzner AMD VMs causes exactly same behavior and switching to Intel VM solved everything ...


> truss -f -d -s 400 /usr/local/bin/msgmerge --update -q /dev/null /dev/null
